description_long: This is a round, shallow picnic basket with a wide, open top and a single, sturdy arched handle. The basket is constructed from tightly woven natural fibers, giving it a rustic, hand-crafted appearance. The weave pattern is consistent and dense, with a slightly varied coloration that mimics the look of real wicker or rattan. The base of the basket is flat and appears to be reinforced, possibly with a wooden or thicker woven insert for added stability. The handle is integrated into the rim, rising smoothly from opposite sides and curving gracefully overhead. There are no visible lids, closures, or decorative embellishments, emphasizing a simple, functional design.
description: A round, shallow woven picnic basket with a single arched handle and a natural wicker appearance. The design is simple, sturdy, and unadorned, ideal for carrying items in outdoor or urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open, circular basket with the arched handle rising symmetrically from both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the handle and the depth of the basket, with the handle appearing as a vertical line.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, showing the open basket and handle from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the handle's arch and the basket's shallow depth.
attribute_handle_type: Single fixed arched handle, woven from the same material as the basket, integrated into the rim on opposite sides.
attribute_weave_pattern: Tight, plain weave with a consistent, slightly varied coloration; no decorative or openwork elements.
